name: chatgpt-bridge
description: Route Codex tasks into ChatGPT standard or Temporary Chat, then generate, export, measure, and review image assets.

interface.longDescription: Open ChatGPT in the Codex in-app browser, route supported one-off work into Temporary Chat, keep image and persistent work in standard chats, recover bounded response errors, export original image assets, measure dimensions, and write review-ready manifests without collecting credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use ChatGPT to generate one image and save the original locally.
Generate a coherent set of 9 images in ChatGPT and export them.
Use Temporary Chat for this small one-off rewrite.
Check whether I am signed in to ChatGPT before generating images.
